languages.text: "Очередные странные руины оказались могилой огиров? Какое удивительное и неожиданное совпадение, верно?" {n}Яда в улыбке Маражая хватит на отсек пустотного корабля.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Очередные странные руины оказались могилой огиров? Какое удивительное и неожиданное совпадение, верно?" {n}Яда в улыбке Маражая хватит на отсек пустотного корабля.{/n}
traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: "Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Очередные странные руины оказались могилой огиров? Какое удивительное и неожиданное совпадение, верно?" {n}Яда в улыбке Маражая хватит на отсек пустотного корабля.{/n}

"Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}

languages.text: “又是一处古怪的遗迹，而且居然是遗落者的墓穴。真是有趣又离奇的巧合，您不觉得吗？”{n}玛拉斋的微笑里满是恶意，简直能毒死一整间舱室的人。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “又是一处古怪的遗迹，而且居然是遗落者的墓穴。真是有趣又离奇的巧合，您不觉得吗？”{n}玛拉斋的微笑里满是恶意，简直能毒死一整间舱室的人。{/n}

languages.text: "Yine bir başka tuhaf harabenin bir Oghyr mezarı olduğu ortaya çıktı. Ne kadar büyüleyici ve beklenmedik bir tesadüf, değil mi?" {n}Marazhai'ın gülümsemesinde bir uçsuz gemisinin koca bir kompartımanını zehirleyecek kadar kötülük var.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yine bir başka tuhaf harabenin bir Oghyr mezarı olduğu ortaya çıktı. Ne kadar büyüleyici ve beklenmedik bir tesadüf, değil mi?" {n}Marazhai'ın gülümsemesinde bir uçsuz gemisinin koca bir kompartımanını zehirleyecek kadar kötülük var.{/n}

languages.text: « Une fois encore, il s'avère que des ruines étranges sont un tombeau des Oghyrs. Une coïncidence aussi fascinante qu'inattendue, n'est-ce pas ? » {n}La voix de Marazhai dégouline tant de malveillance qu'elle pourrait empoisonner un compartiment de vaisseau tout entier.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Une fois encore, il s'avère que des ruines étranges sont un tombeau des Oghyrs. Une coïncidence aussi fascinante qu'inattendue, n'est-ce pas ? » {n}La voix de Marazhai dégouline tant de malveillance qu'elle pourrait empoisonner un compartiment de vaisseau tout entier.{/n}

languages.text: «Otro conjunto de ruinas extrañas más que resulta ser una tumba de Oghyr. Una coincidencia tan fascinante como inesperada, ¿no te parece?». {n}Hay tanta malicia en la sonrisa de Marazhai como para envenenar todo un compartimento de una nave del vacío.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Otro conjunto de ruinas extrañas más que resulta ser una tumba de Oghyr. Una coincidencia tan fascinante como inesperada, ¿no te parece?». {n}Hay tanta malicia en la sonrisa de Marazhai como para envenenar todo un compartimento de una nave del vacío.{/n}

languages.text: "Und wieder erweisen sich seltsame Ruinen als Oghyrgrab. Was für ein faszinierender und unerwarteter Zufall, findet Ihr nicht?" {n}In Marazhais Lächeln ist genügend Bosheit, um ein ganzes Modul eines Raumschiffs zu vergiften.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Und wieder erweisen sich seltsame Ruinen als Oghyrgrab. Was für ein faszinierender und unerwarteter Zufall, findet Ihr nicht?" {n}In Marazhais Lächeln ist genügend Bosheit, um ein ganzes Modul eines Raumschiffs zu vergiften.{/n}

languages.text: 「またしても奇妙な遺跡がオグイヤーの墓であることが判明した。実に興味深く、予想外の偶然ではないだろうか？」{n}マラーザイの笑顔には、虚空船の客席全体を毒するほどの悪意が宿っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet another set of strange ruins turns out to be an Oghyr tomb. What a fascinating and unexpected coincidence, wouldn't you say?" {n}There is enough malice in Marazhai's smile to poison an entire compartment of a voidship.{/n}
